case_title: LEMUS, ALCIRA vs. MERCURIO, JANICE JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMUS, ALCIRA AS TO DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED
MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT BY JANICE J. MERCURIO FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE JOSEPH

M8/#624, JUDGE WALLACE DOUGLASS, CSR SONYA WONG, CLERK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL, SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 3240 - 17TH ST, S.F. ON 4-3-98; IF DEFT PAYS $350. TO ATTY LAWRENCE MURRAY BY 4-3-98, PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE POSSESSION ON 4-30-98. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT IS STAYED TO 4-30-98. A MONEY JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $700. WITH LAWFUL INTEREST STAYED TO 6-3-98. THE PARTIES STIPULATE AS SET FORTH WITHOUT WAIVING OTHER CLAIMS BETWEEN THE PARTIES. LAWRENCE MURRAY FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCURIO, JANICE JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3240 - 17TH STREET, S.F. $700.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JDGMT STAYED TO 6-3-98. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
